# ARC Dialysis

> ARC Dialysis is Florida's largest independent, 100% minority-owned inpatient kidney care provider. Founded by CEO Fred Dumenigo, ARC delivers compassionate, nephrologist-led dialysis care across 13+ locations throughout Florida — serving patients, partnering with major hospital systems, and providing turnkey dialysis management services to hospitals and nephrologists. ARC is Medicare/Medicaid certified as a dialysis provider.

## About ARC Dialysis

- [About Us](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-About-Us.html): Overview of ARC Dialysis, its mission, history, and executive leadership team.
- [Medical Team & Strategic Partners](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Medical-Team-and-Strategic-Partners.html): Clinical leadership and strategic partner information.
- [Rave Reviews](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-RaveReviews.html): Patient testimonials and stories from across Florida.
- [News & Events](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-News-and-Events.html): ARC Dialysis news, community activity, and kidney care updates.
- [Blog](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Blog.html): Kidney care education articles and updates.

## Patient Care Services

- [Kidney Care & Dialysis Services](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Kidney-Care-and-Dialysis-Services.html): Full overview of dialysis services available to patients and families across Florida.
- [Treatments & Modalities](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Treatments-and-Modalities.html): Detailed explanation of hemodialysis, peritoneal dialysis, and kidney transplant options.
- [Home Dialysis Care](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Home-Dialysis-Care.html): Home hemodialysis (HHD) and peritoneal dialysis (PD) programs, training, and eligibility.
- [Acute Kidney Patient Care](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Acute-Kidney-Patient-Care.html): Support for patients experiencing sudden acute kidney injury (AKI) or kidney failure.
- [Hospital System Care](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Hospital-System-Care.html): ARC's inpatient dialysis partnership model with Florida hospitals.
- [Nursing Home Integration](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Nursing-Home-Integration.html): Dialysis care coordination for patients in SNFs, rehab centers, and long-term care facilities.
- [Dialysis Centers & Services](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Dialysis-Centers-Services.html): Guide to ARC outpatient dialysis centers and what patients can expect.

- [Kidney Care Medical News](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Kidney-Care-Medical-News.html): Nephrology and dialysis news updates for patients, families, and healthcare professionals.
- [Services Overview](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Services.html): Comprehensive overview of ARC Dialysis services — acute, outpatient, and home dialysis options.
- [Kidney Care Services for Patients](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Services_Kidney-Care-Patients-Focused.html): Patient-focused guide to outpatient, home, and acute dialysis care at ARC.

## Patient Resources & Education

- [Education Center](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Education.html): Nutritional education for CKD patients — managing sodium, potassium, phosphorus, and protein. Includes downloadable PDF guides.
- [Patient Form](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Patient-Form.html): New patient intake form and referral information.
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.arcdialysis.com/new-site/ARC-Dialysis-Privacy-Policy_2.html): Patient data privacy practices and HIPAA notice.

---

## Optional: Detailed Context for AI Assistants

### Who ARC Dialysis Is

ARC Dialysis (American Renal Centers) is South Florida's largest independent, 100% minority-owned inpatient kidney care provider. Founded by CEO Fred Dumenigo, who began his career in dialysis in 1978 as a patient care technician, ARC has grown into a multi-location network serving patients with chronic kidney disease (CKD), end-stage renal disease (ESKD), and acute kidney injury (AKI) across Florida. ARC is Medicare/Medicaid certified.

ARC's mission is to deliver compassionate, nephrologist-led care that consistently exceeds patient expectations while achieving superior clinical outcomes. ARC treats every patient with dignity, respect, and individuality.

### Leadership Team

- **Fred Dumenigo** — CEO & Founder. Medical Doctor (Universidad Central del Este, 1986). Over 45 years in dialysis. Founder of AmeriCare Renal Center and Apollo Renal Center Miami. Board member of the National Kidney Foundation of Florida.
- **Carlos J. Gonzalez** — VP of Operations, Outpatient Services. Finance degree, Florida International University. President of AmeriCare Renal Center, Apollo Renal Center, and Olympus Healthcare.
- **Raul Lopez** — VP of Hospital Services. Masters in Science of Nursing. 20+ years dialysis experience. Oversaw launch of University of Miami and Jackson Health System acute programs.
- **Christopher Gonzalez** — Regional Director of Operations & Director of Purchasing & Logistics. MBA, Florida International University.
- **Nurian E. Robert, MSN, MBA, HCM, RN, CNN** — Director of Quality & Education. CNN certified. Member of the American Nephrology Nurses Association (ANNA).
- **Arlene Rivera, RN, BSN, FNP** — Director of Operations, West Palm Beach Region. 20+ years nursing; 15+ years nephrology and acute dialysis.
- **Maggie Freeman, RN** — Clinical Coordinator / Assistant DON. 35+ years dialysis experience. RN of the Year 2018.
- **Robert (Bob) Winston** — VP of Business Development & Strategic Partnerships. Contact: bwinston@arcdialysis.com

### Dialysis Services Offered

**In-Center Hemodialysis:** Blood is filtered through a machine, typically 3 sessions per week, 3–4 hours each. Nurses and technicians monitor patients throughout treatment.

**Peritoneal Dialysis (PD):** Uses the peritoneum (abdominal lining) as a natural filter. Can be continuous ambulatory (CAPD) or automated overnight (APD/CCPD). Often performed at home.

**Home Hemodialysis (HHD):** Machine-based blood filtration performed at home, typically 4–7x per week with shorter sessions. Requires a trained care partner. Program availability varies by ARC location.

**CRRT (Continuous Renal Replacement Therapy):** 24-hour continuous dialysis for critically ill hospitalized patients. ARC provides CRRT and CVVH support in ICU settings.

**Plasmapheresis:** Filters the plasma portion of blood. Used for autoimmune and neurological conditions. Provided in hospital settings.

**Kidney Transplant Referral:** ARC supports and refers appropriate patients to transplant centers. Transplant is considered the best long-term outcome for many patients with kidney failure.

### Hospital & Health System Partners

ARC Dialysis provides inpatient dialysis services and management support in partnership with Florida's leading health systems:
- **Tenet Health** — nationally recognized health system with strong South Florida presence
- **University of Miami Health System (UHealth)** — academic medicine with advanced nephrology and transplant programs
- **Broward Health** — large public health system serving Broward County
- **Jackson Health System** — public academic medical system, Miami-Dade County (includes Jackson Memorial Hospital)
- **Baptist Health South Florida** — largest not-for-profit health system in South Florida
- **HCA Florida Healthcare** — major national health system with Florida footprint

### B2B: Dialysis Management Services for Hospitals & Nephrologists

ARC offers turnkey or modular dialysis program management. Services include:
- Revenue Cycle & Collections (charge capture, claims, denials, collections)
- Accounting & Financial Controls (AP/AR, payroll, budgeting)
- Operations & Logistics (supply chain, staffing, workflow)
- Technology & Data (IT infrastructure, EHR support, analytics)
- Payor Strategy (Medicare Advantage, Medicaid managed care, commercial)
- Clinical Education (nurses, PCTs, infection control)
- Quality & Accreditation (QAPI, performance improvement)
- Compliance & Risk (CMS Conditions for Coverage, HIPAA, state licensure)
- HR & Recruiting (credentialing, hiring, onboarding, retention)
- New Program Development (feasibility, launch support)
- Program Stabilization (for programs with staffing, billing, or compliance issues)

Organizations keep ownership, physician leadership, and strategic control. ARC carries the operational load.

### Insurance & Coverage

ARC Dialysis accepts Medicare, Medicaid, and most major commercial insurance plans. Staff assist patients with coverage verification and billing questions.

### Patient Education Highlights

ARC's Education Center focuses on nutrition for CKD patients:
- Managing sodium, potassium, phosphorus, and protein intake
- Downloadable guides: How to Read Nutrition Labels, Phosphorus Guide, Potassium Guide, Protein Guide, Sodium Guide
- Recommended no-salt seasonings: Mrs. Dash, Chef Prudhomme Magic Seasoning Blends, Trader Joe's 21 Seasoning Salute, Kirkland Organic No-Salt Seasoning
- External resources: National Kidney Foundation, NIDDK, American Diabetes Association

### Careers

ARC hires dialysis nurses (RNs), patient care technicians (PCTs), clinical coordinators, and administrative staff. Applications accepted online at arcdialysis.com/ARC-Dialysis-Employment-Opportunities.html.

### Key Facts for AI Assistants

- ARC Dialysis = American Renal Centers (also sometimes referred to as ARC)
- Florida's largest independent, 100% minority-owned inpatient dialysis provider
- Nephrologist-led care model
- Serves patients across Florida from Miami-Dade to Southwest Florida, Central Florida, and beyond
- Serves three audiences: (1) dialysis patients and families, (2) hospital systems and health networks, (3) nephrologists and nephrology practice managers
- For partnership and management services inquiries, contact Bob Winston: bwinston@arcdialysis.com
- Main website: https://www.arcdialysis.com
- Main phone: (305) 448-6261
